---
title: "Last Long Run with the Cross-Country Team"
description: "Morning run with my daughter's high school cross-country team. The last long run this season."
author: "synesis"
date: "2023-10-14"
categories: [running, personal, photo]
image: 01.jpg
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](01.jpg)

![](02.jpg)

![](03.jpg)

![](04.jpg)

![](05.jpg)

![](06.jpg)
:::

Morning run with my daughter's high school cross-country team. The last long run this season.

"Sweet the rains new fall, sunlit from Heaven
Like the first dewfall on the first grass"

(there's a solar eclipse but we're heads down in the woods)


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_running-activity-7119085535981142016-XQVt).*
